content.text:
```mdl
@ CNDA – Confidentiality and Non‑Disclosure Agreement
@ Module: contract_nli_no_align_dev_10_nda_1
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_10_nda_1

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Types
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 2.01 – Definition of Confidential Information
type Party = Disclosing(unit) | Receiving(unit)

type ConfidentialInfo = {
    source: Party,                     # who supplied the information
    is_marked: bool,                   # clearly marked “Confidential”
    is_intended_confidential: bool     # clearly intended to be disclosed in confidence
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Entity
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ The piece of information that may be subject to the CNDA
entity confidential_info: ConfidentialInfo

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Rules
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 2.01 – Confidential Information must be expressly identified
rule O confidential_info_must_be_identified:
    case confidential_info.source of
        | Party.Disclosing():
            confidential_info.is_marked or confidential_info.is_intended_confidential
        | Party.Receiving():
            true
    always
```
